request.query: 2024 2025 2026 AI social apps AI companion apps AI roleplay apps interactive entertainment apps language exchange apps similar to HelloTalk Tandem AI dating offline dates local activity social apps group travel social platforms and IRL offline social apps funding growth news
request.systemPrompt: Prefer primary company pages, funding announcements, reputable tech media, app-market reports, and research papers. Collapse duplicates. Separate AI-only companion products from products that create real offline human interactions such as dinners, events, group travel, local activities, and offline-first dating. Return concise Chinese output grounded in sources.

summary.description: A concise Chinese synthesis of the market and opportunity.

core_products.description: Important AI social, AI companion, language exchange, or entertainment products.

irl_products.description: Products that connect users to real offline human interactions.

watchlist.description: Products or categories to keep monitoring because evidence is incomplete or adjacent.

risks.description: Safety, regulation, monetization, or evidence risks.

results.title: SoMe Social | IRL Social
results.author: Exa
highlights:
SoMe Social | IRL Social

top of page

# SoMe Social

Plan Less. Do more. Together

### SoMe Stories

### “Sometimes I just want to meet someone who laughs at the same dumb stuff I do. SoMe somehow delivered.” - Jin

### SoMe Stories

### "I met Keith at a SoMe sushi night. We bonded over soy sauce preferences. I swear." - Alina

### SoMe Stories

### “Signed up for a dumpling crawl just for fun... now I’m dating the guy I split soup dumplings with.” - Erica

## VISION

​

Tired of endless swiping that leads nowhere?

SoMe is built for people ready to move beyond apps and into real life.

We make it simple to turn meaningful online connections into intentional, in-person dates—no stress, no guesswork.

From coffee meetups to concerts and curated experiences, SoMe helps you skip the small talk and build something real.

Hundreds of handpicked local merchants — from buzzing nightlife spots to hidden neighborhood gems — to bring you unforgettable experiences, exclusive perks, and the best our city has to offer.

## HOW WE DO IT

​​

We prioritize people who truly get you — those with similar values, backgrounds, and passions.

​

You choose the events you’re excited about, and we match you with others who’ve made the same commitment. It’s not just a swipe — it’s a plan.

### Selected Partnerships

bottom of page

properties.name: SoMe AI
properties.description:
SoMe is building the infrastructure for real-world dating.

Dating apps have solved discovery, but failed at execution — fewer than 10% of matches ever turn into a date. The bottleneck is everything after the match: planning, coordination, and follow-through.

SoMe closes this gap by turning intent into confirmed, real-world interactions.

Our platform uses AI to guide users from matching to booking curated experiences — including restaurants, cafés, and social venues — all integrated with prepaid reservations. This removes friction, increases accountability, and significantly improves conversion from match to meeting.

We operate a two-sided marketplace:
	•	Users get personalized, end-to-end date planning
	•	Merchants receive guaranteed, high-intent, prepaid traffic

This alignment creates a fundamentally different dynamic from traditional dating apps, shifting the model from engagement-driven to outcome-driven.

We are building at the intersection of AI, consumer behavior, and local commerce — with a focus on converting online intent into offline action at scale.

results.title: Live Events Platform POSH Raises $37M Series B Funding Round To Apply AI To Support Organizers - AfroTech | AfroTech
results.author: Blavity Engineering
highlights:
Live Events Platform POSH Raises $37M Series B Funding Round To Apply AI To Support Organizers - AfroTech | AfroTech
...
# Live Events Platform POSH Raises $37M Series B Funding Round To Apply AI To Support Organizers
...
POSH live events platform has raised new funding.
...
They knew the industry’s pain points and wanted to improve the experience for students and organizers, so they built POSH in 2019 as a software product and launched it as well as a mobile app in 2023.
...
POSH has evolved since its inception and now also includes a personalized feed and an algorithm that shows users events aligned with their interests. POSH has nearly 6 million users and nearly 50,000 organizers on its platform, according to Forbes.
...
Fortune reports that POSH has an estimated $40 million in cumulative revenue, processed $350 million in gross merchandise value, and issued 25 million tickets since its inception. Additionally, top organizers have generated more than $10 million on the platform.
...
POSH has now raised $37 million in a Series B funding round led by FirstMark Capital. Causeway Ventures, Goodwater Capital, Companyon Ventures, and Epic Ventures also participated in the round. The Series B round includes support from returning investors.
...
This follows a $5 million seed round in 2023, per TechCrunch, and a $22 million Series A round in 2024.
...
“6 years ago, people told us a better events platform was a solved problem. 8m users and $350M in GMV later, we’re just getting started. Posh started with a simple belief: events deserve better technology. Since then, thousands of organizers have used Posh to create & grow sustainable IRL communities of every kind – from intimate gatherings to large-scale festivals,” Price said on LinkedIn.
...
The round will ensure POSH can expand its organizer feature set to support countless use cases, further personalize the consumer experience, and also to integrate AI to support organizers with semantic insights and agentic operations, Price said in the LinkedIn post.

results.title: Vivilo raises €628K pre-seed round for AI-powered event content - Tech.eu
highlights:
Vivilo raises €
...
pre-seed round for AI-powered event content - Tech.eu
...
# Vivilo raises €628K pre-seed round for AI-powered event content
...
Vivilo will use the new funding to support growth, platform development and team expansion as it scales its AI-powered technology for creating and distributing personalised photo and video content for event participants.
...
Italian startup Vivilo(formerly known as Jubatus) has raised €628,000 in a pre-seed funding round to support the next phase of its growth. The round attracted a group of Italian investors, including entrepreneurs, executives, engineers, lawyers and technology professionals.
...
Founded by Logan Para, Marco Ciabini and Gionata Manduchi, Vivilo has developed a proprietary platform capable of recognising faces, race numbers, objects, vehicles and other visual elements within event footage. The technology automatically generates personalised content (including photographs, video clips and short-form videos) which participants can purchase, download and share shortly after an event concludes.
...
The company works with both event organisers and content production partners, helping automate what has traditionally been a time-consuming post-event process. By simplifying content distribution and reducing manual workloads, the platform aims to create additional revenue opportunities for organisers while improving the experience for participants.
...
Vivilo's technology is designed for a broad range of event formats, including sports competitions, motorsport events, music festivals, trade fairs, concerts and community gatherings.
...
Vivilo was born from a simple observation: participants often invest significant time and effort into an event, yet have limited access to professional content that captures the experience. With this funding, we plan to accelerate commercial growth, strengthen the platform and expand into new sectors, including motorsport, festivals, trade fairs, concerts and community events,
...
The new funding will be used to support marketing and brand awareness initiatives, further platform development and team expansion. Part of the investment will also be directed toward advancing Vivilo's proprietary recognition technology for motorsport applications, including the identification of motorcycles, cars, helmets and vehicle models.
...
The funding comes as Vivilo continues a period of growth. The company said it is already profitable and aims to strengthen its position in the European market for personalised event content. It is also exploring international expansion opportunities, with longer-term plans to establish a presence in the US.

results.title: Komunite Raises $600K Pre-Series A to Expand AI-Powered Entrepreneurial Community and Innovation Hub - VC Tavern
results.author: VC Tavern
highlights:
Komunite, a Turkish entrepreneurship community and platform that unites creators, startup founders and professionals in a shared ecosystem, has successfully raised $600,000 in a pre‑Series A investment round as part of its effort to scale its online community, AI services and physical meeting center. The financing, completed at a $10 million valuation, demonstrates investor confidence in Komunite’s ability to grow both its digital network and its real-world presence for entrepreneurs and micro-businesses.
...
Founded by Fatih Güner, Komunite positions itself as both a digital networking hub and a development center for entrepreneurs, creators and professionals who aim to grow their skills, products and businesses. With more than 2,200 paid members, over 20,000 newsletter subscribers and upwards of 40,000 social media followers, Komunite’s expanding user base offers a strong foundation for the platform’s broader impact. The capital infusion will help the company build on this momentum by enhancing its community tools, scaling AI features and expanding offerings for members.
...
One of the startup’s most rapidly developing projects is Lokomotif AI, which has garnered interest particularly from corporate professionals. This segment focuses on AI-driven educational and development programs, with over 6,000 participants attending to date. Komunite has also launched two notable products within its ecosystem: Insighter, a brand monitoring tool powered by large language models, and VocalSense AI, which delivers simulation-based training for sales teams using real-world scenarios — innovations that expand the company’s portfolio beyond traditional community engagement services.
...
The $600,000 raise is seen by the company as a springboard for ambitious future goals, including regional expansion and leadership in helping businesses undergo AI transformation. Komunite aims to leverage its funding to build out scalable digital services, enhance user experiences with personalized AI insights, and strengthen its brand as a vibrant hub for innovation and entrepreneurial growth across Turkey and beyond.
...
As Komunite continues to scale its member base and expand the reach of its AI and community services, the company hopes to play a leading role in fostering entrepreneurship in the region. By combining digital engagement, AI-driven tools and real-world connection points like Komunite Space, the startup is positioning itself at the crossroads of technology-enabled learning, professional networking and collaborative innovation — promising a future where creators and founders have the resources and infrastructure to grow successfully.

results.title: swsh Raises $4M from Scooter Braun, Guy Oseary, Julie Greenwald & More
results.author: Kristin Robinson
highlights:
swsh, a fan engagement platform for live experiences, has closed a $4 million seed round led by Game Changers Ventures, an early-stage venture firm investing at the intersection of sports, media, entertainment and technology. This fundraise also included participation from Stellation Capital, SignalFire and MaC Venture Capital, as well as notable angel investors like Scooter Braun, Guy Oseary, Julie Greenwald, Cory Levy, Hans Tung, Chris Detert, Shachar Scott and Austin Rief.
...
With swsh, fans are able to find photos of themselves at an event, upload their user-generated content in bulk to the service and connect with other event-goers online. This helps artists — or other public figures utilizing swsh — to quickly and easily obtain fan-created content to use on their social media pages by searching through a library of owned media, powered by artificial intelligence. In an age where clipping, UGC and fan page strategies are core to breaking artists, swsh is a way to scale these strategies quickly and maximize the reach an artist can have online.
...
swsh has already become a popular offering in the music industry and is commonly used when artists go on tour, helping them capture videos of their performances from every angle. Now, the company hopes to expand into other industries where live experiences are paramount, like collegiate sports. According to a press release, this funding round will be spent on accelerating adoption for swsh, especially in music, sports and global brands that invest in experiential marketing. The round will also be used to continue swsh’s growth across “team expansion, product and infrastructure, acquisition channels, and enterprise partnerships.”
...
“Today, brands, artists, teams, and agencies rely heavily on live experiences to generate some of
...
“Live experiences are becoming one of the most important environments for understanding audiences,” adds Roger Ehrenberg, managing partner at Game Changers Ventures. “As organizations shift toward first-party audience relationships and participation-driven engagement strategies, swsh is the infrastructure for capturing the moments that define live culture. In a world of infinite AI-generated content, real human UGC will stand out and outperform.”

results.title: Meet Shapes, the app bringing humans and AI into the same group chats | TechCrunch
results.author: Aisha Malik
highlights:
Shapes, an app where humans and AI characters chat together in shared group conversations, is emerging from stealth with $8 million in seed funding. Think Discord, but with AI characters alongside humans.
...
Founded in 2022, Shapes has more than 400,000 monthly active users. The app’s founders, Anushk Mittal and Noorie Dhingra, believe that Shapes can address issues around “ AI psychosis,” which refers to cases where prolonged interactions with AI chatbots or AI companions can cause individuals to develop delusions or paranoia.
...
with one-on-one
...
interactions with real people
...
and can interact in all
...
re clearly labeled
...
Users can create their own Shapes and set their personalities. The company says users have already created three million Shapes to add into group chats. Many Shapes are rooted in fandom, as the app serves as a way for fans to deep-dive on subculture and meet other fans.
...
While some may question the need for adding AI into group chats, Mittal and Dhingra believe one of the main reasons group chats die is that some participants don’t want to be the first person to send a message. Shapes solves this, as AI agents can initiate conversations and play a key role in keeping them going.
...
Additionally, users don’t have to worry about not getting a response to their messages because Shapes will always acknowledge and respond to them. Unlike AI companions on other apps that need to be summoned, Shapes have free will and can decide when to message.
...
It’s worth noting that although the popular chatbot ChatGPT already allows AI and humans to converse in group chats, those conversations operate differently from Shapes. For example, when you create a group chat in ChatGPT, it’s mostly for planning or brainstorming. On Shapes, however, it’s all about social, community-style interactions with AI characters that have various personalities.
...
“Shapes is about human conversations,” Mittal said. “It’s more of a next-gen chat app than an AI app. The demographic is people who are obsessively online, who spend a lot of time online connecting and sharing. Those are the users who come in and they get an opportunity to obsess about their interests, and the AI acts as a facilitator in those conversations.”
...
Shapes’ growth has been driven by word of mouth, Mittal says, with the app seeing a sixfold increase in users since the start of the year. The company also says that thousands of users spend two to four hours in the app each day.
...
As for the new funding, the company plans to use it to accelerate development and user acquisition. The round was led by Lightspeed, with participation from AI Capital Partners, AI Grant, and angel investors.

results.title: New Dating App Yeet Introduces Yeeta, the First AI Dating Agent Designed to Fuel Human Interaction, Not Replace It
results.author: Yeet
highlights:
NEW YORK, April 15, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Yeet today officially announced the launch of its AI agent-led dating experience, powered by Yeeta, the first AI dating agent designed to join and fuel stronger conversations between users. Built around real-time human interaction, the platform introduces a new model for online dating — one where conversation comes first and decisions come second.
...
At the center of the experience is Yeeta, the AI dating agent facilitating live, two-person conversations inside the app. Unlike traditional AI systems that interact with one user at a time, Yeeta operates within a shared interaction between two people, interpreting both sides in real time and helping the conversation flow naturally.
...
Yeeta brings two compatible users together into a live conversation, so connection starts with interaction, not a split-second judgment on a profile. With Yeeta guiding the experience, users can talk first and decide if it's a match later. Connection and chemistry can be discovered in real time, bringing the experience closer to how connection happens in person.
...
- Yeeta: Yeeta is the AI system working across the full experience, from discovering compatible vibes to actively supporting live, two-person interaction. Yeeta helps open conversations, maintain momentum, and avoid awkward pauses, without ever speaking for the user or taking their place.
...
- Vibin' Chats: No endless swiping. When two compatible users are online, they're dropped directly into a live 'Vibin' Chat," removing the friction of waiting, matching, and second-guessing, and making it easier to connect in the moment.
...
- No Ghosting (By Design): By encouraging people to engage when they are both present, Yeet reduces the drop-off and dead-end conversations that define today's traditional dating apps, so that users leave with either a genuine connection or a clean sense of closure.
...
- 80% Same Day Return: 8 out of 10 of users who complete at least one full Vibin' Chat return within the same day
- 46% higher retention among users who completed at least one Vibin' Chat vs. industry benchmarks: Once users experience a real-time interaction, they stick around.
- +30% increase in meaningful conversations vs. traditional dating apps
...
Yeet is available on the App Store and Google Play. The app is currently free, with an extended trial period as the experience continues to evolve.
...
Yeet is redefining how dating works. Instead of optimizing for matches, it is built to optimize for interaction. At the center is Yeeta, the first AI dating agent to actively join the chat, bringing compatible users into live, two-person conversations and helping them move from small talk to meaningful connection.

results.title: Teamily AI Officially Enters the Singapore Market, Launching its Personal AI Agent OS -- Redefining Personal AGI Through Self-Improving AI+Human Social Network
results.author: Teamily AI
highlights:
SINGAPORE, May 26, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Teamily AI, the Silicon Valley-based pioneer behind the world's first human+AI social network app (an AI-native blend of WhatsApp, TikTok, and Instagram), today announced its official entry into the Singapore market with the simultaneous launch of its highly anticipated iOS and Android mobile applications. Backed by US$20M in funding, the company is introducing its personal and social AI Agent OS to Southeast Asia to bring productivity and creativity to everyone's life and work. At the core of its uniqueness and innovation is a three-layer full-stack approach, powered by top-tier talent in AI research and engineering, spanning a social network-powered super AI app, proprietary foundation models with reinforcement learning, and multi-agent harness infrastructure. This vision closely aligns with Singapore's National AI Strategy 2.0 (NAIS 2.0) and the government's commitment to more than S$154.7 billion in AI-driven transformation outlined in the 2026 Budget.
...
"Teamily AI platform now has more than 4.5 million users registered worldwide
...
our business into Singapore
...
it is one of the global leaders in AI governance
...
innovation, making it the
...
government's commitment
...
- Layer 1: A social network-powered super AI app: a human+AI symbiotic platform where people and agents collaborate as peers in real time, across group chats, communities, and teams. Unlike conventional AI tools, Teamily AI embeds agents natively into the social fabric: they participate in conversations, share context, co-create content, and evolve alongside the humans they work with.
...
Teamily AI is the personal and social AI agent platform to discover, create, and share anything inspiring creativity and productivity for life and work. It pursues personal AGI, redefined by a human+AI social network and self-improving reinforcement learning. Headquartered in Silicon Valley, California, with a rapidly growing team in Singapore, the company's proprietary architecture allows AI agents to work as genuine team members. Founded by Dr. Aiden Chaoyang He (USC PhD, formerly with Tencent, Meta, Google, and Amazon) and Prof. Salman Avestimehr (Dean's Professor at USC and Chairman, PhD from UC Berkeley), Teamily AI has raised US$20 million in seed funding and currently serves a community of 5M+ users. For more information, visit https://teamily.ai/

properties.name: bub AI
properties.description:
Backed by experts from Meta, Lyft, and BeReal, recognized as a Top 3 finalist in MIT's Venture Accelerator Program (VAP), and alumni of Draper University’s accelerator.
_____________________________________________________________

Social apps today trap us in mindless scrolling or dead group chats that rarely lead to genuine connection. People are more digitally connected yet lonelier than ever.

Bub AI changes that. Our AI agents—"Bubs"—transform social interactions into personalized, playful, and meaningful moments. Whether it's friends, hobby groups, university communities, dating mixers, or events, Bubs create interactions uniquely tailored to your interests and social style.

Customize or choose your Bubs, and they'll deliver daily "Sparks"—interactive challenges, mini-games, thoughtful matchmaking, and engaging conversations designed to foster real connections without the effort, awkwardness or social-media fatigue.

Stop scrolling. Start connecting.

POSH (现场活动与线下社区平台)

Bub AI (AI社交连接器与社区互动)
risks: 社交应用被误用为约会平台的合规与用户体验风险
过度自动化导致的连接疏离感
监管与数据隐私合规要求
content.summary: 2024至2026年期间，AI社交与辅助类应用快速增长，主要趋势包括将AI整合进人类群组互动（如Shapes）或作为个人助手（如Teamily AI）以增强连接，而非取代人类。在语言交流与约会领域，应用正在从简单的配对转向实时互动驱动的模式（如Yeet）。同时，市场出现明显的线下驱动（IRL）趋势，通过AI辅助活动组织（如POSH、Always Friday）、内容分发及线下活动平台（如SoMe Social、Komunite）来弥合数字与现实世界的鸿沟，强化真实的社交体验。
